item.title: GLP-1 receptor agonists shift from weight loss to longevity discussions

item.title: Adverse pregnancy outcomes linked to worse offspring cardiovascular health in early adulthood
item.description: Exposure to adverse pregnancy outcomes, especially hypertensive disorders, was associated with poorer cardiovascular health and early...
